task: Search for a young spayed male dog cared for by a private owner within 50 miles of zip 33109.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the search on Adopt a Pet and reached the filtered results page. Evidence shows the final URL was https://www.adoptapet.com/pet-search?speciesId=1&radius=50&postalCode=33109&city=null&state=null&transport=false&age[0]=young&sex[0]=m&caredForBy[0]=private_owner&spayedNeutered=true, which matches the requested constraints: dog, zip 33109, within 50 miles, young, male, private owner, and spayed/neutered. The page visibly displayed the applied filters and showed 6 available pets. The listed visible results in the agent’s summary match the page snapshot: Baby (American Bulldog, Hialeah), Tony (Carolina Dog, Miami), Apollo (American Pit Bull Terrier, Miami Beach), Enzo (Labrador Retriever, Hollywood), Dozer (Rottweiler, Fort Lauderdale), and Denver (Dalmatian, Highland Beach).
